summary: The current-main server evidence handoff now resolves GHCR OCI index digests first and falls back to platform manifest digests only when Docker Buildx is unavailable.
intentionallyNotChanged: No production server deploy was attempted
No production preflight or real load was executed
No runtime image SHA or published digest was changed

validations.command: JSON parse for current-main handoff and active-goal blocker JSON artifacts
git diff --check for modified handoff, blocker audit, and TODO files

remainingBlocker: Production server pull/deploy, production preflight, and Real Backend Test evidence remain missing because production SSH secrets and local secret material are unavailable.
recommendation: Keep this handoff fix and use the fixed script when production SSH secrets or manual server evidence become available.
